properties.displayName: Fortigate - 単一ソースからの拒否トラフィック急増
properties.description: 単一の送信元 IP から大量の拒否トラフィックが発生した場合にアラートを生成します。ポートスキャン、ネットワーク偵察、またはワーム活動の兆候を示す可能性があります。
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet"
| where DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where DeviceAction has_any ("deny", "drop", "blocked", "reject")
| summarize
    DeniedCount = count(),
    DistinctDestIPs = dcount(DestinationIP),
    DistinctDestPorts = dcount(DestinationPort),
    TopDestPorts = make_set(DestinationPort, 20),
    TopDestIPs = make_set(DestinationIP, 10),
    FirstEvent = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastEvent = max(TimeGenerated)
    by SourceIP, DeviceName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where DeniedCount >= 100
| extend IsScanLikely = iff(DistinctDestPorts > 10 or DistinctDestIPs > 10, true, false)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    SourceIP,
    DeniedCount,
    DistinctDestIPs,
    DistinctDestPorts,
    IsScanLikely,
    TopDestPorts,
    TopDestIPs,
    DeviceName,
    FirstEvent,
    LastEvent
